id.description: The unique identifier for the user.

isAdmin.description: Whether the user has administrative privileges.

loyaltyPoints.description: The number of loyalty points the user has earned.

profilePhoto.description: The URL of the user's profile photo.

wishlist.description: The IDs of products in the user's wishlist.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: A customer review for a product.

id.description: The unique identifier for the review.

productId.description: The ID of the product being reviewed.

userId.description: The ID of the user who wrote the review.

userName.description: The name of the user who wrote the review.

rating.description: The rating given to the product (1-5).

createdAt.description: The date and time the review was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the product.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

price.description: The price of the product in KES.

category.description: The category the product belongs to.

image.description: The URL of the product's image.

rating.description: The average rating of the product.

featured.description: Whether the product is featured on the home page.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: A purchase made by a user.

id.description: The unique identifier for the order.

userId.description: The ID of the user who placed the order.

items.description: The items included in the order.

total.description: The total cost of the order.

status.description: The current status of the order.

createdAt.description: The date and time the order was placed.

pointsEarned.description: The number of loyalty points earned from this order.

Inquiry.title: Inquiry
Inquiry.description: A contact message sent by a user.

id.description: The unique identifier for the inquiry.

name.description: The name of the person sending the inquiry.

email.description: The email address of the person sending the inquiry.

message.description: The content of the inquiry message.

createdAt.description: The date and time the inquiry was sent.

read.description: Whether the inquiry has been read by an admin.
